violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025
Facility does not have a handsink. Handsink is required in all food establishments for proper handwashing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Service call placed. Paper products will be used until dishwasher is serviced and achieving proper sanitizing concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
